steps.title: Set up the linear equation
steps.content:
A member pays a one-time \$38 enrollment fee and \$18 per month. Let $m$ be the number of months. The total cost after $m$ months is:
$$38 + 18m = 182$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of months
steps.content:
Subtract 38 from both sides:
$$18m = 182 - 38 = 144$$
Divide both sides by 18:
$$m = \frac{144}{18} = 8$$
Therefore, a member will have been charged for 8 months.
